metadata.description: Batch complet de publications scientifiques prêtes pour insertion

publications.title: CRISPR-Cas9 genome editing in human embryonic stem cells
publications.abstract: We demonstrate efficient CRISPR-Cas9 mediated genome editing in human embryonic stem cells with 95% efficiency and minimal off-target effects.

publications.title: Single-cell RNA sequencing reveals novel neuronal populations
publications.abstract: Using single-cell RNA sequencing, we identified 15 previously unknown neuronal cell types in the human prefrontal cortex.

publications.title: Structural basis of SARS-CoV-2 spike protein receptor binding
publications.abstract: Crystal structure of SARS-CoV-2 spike protein reveals key interactions with ACE2 receptor at 2.1 Å resolution.

publications.title: Genome-wide association study identifies 50 loci for type 2 diabetes
publications.abstract: GWAS meta-analysis of 500,000 individuals reveals 50 novel genetic loci associated with type 2 diabetes risk.

publications.title: Evolutionary analysis of CRISPR systems across bacterial phyla
publications.abstract: Comprehensive phylogenetic analysis reveals horizontal gene transfer patterns of CRISPR-Cas systems in bacteria.

publications.title: Phase III trial of pembrolizumab for metastatic melanoma
publications.abstract: Randomized controlled trial demonstrates 65% overall response rate in 850 patients with metastatic melanoma.

publications.title: Novel biomarkers for early detection of pancreatic cancer
publications.abstract: We identified a panel of 12 circulating biomarkers with 92% sensitivity for detecting stage I pancreatic cancer.

publications.title: CAR-T cell therapy for refractory B-cell lymphoma
publications.abstract: Chimeric antigen receptor T-cell therapy achieves 78% complete remission rate in refractory B-cell lymphoma.

publications.title: Genetic risk factors for coronary artery disease
publications.abstract: Multi-ethnic GWAS identifies 85 loci associated with coronary artery disease, including 30 novel variants.

publications.title: mRNA vaccine platform for rapid pandemic response
publications.abstract: Modular mRNA vaccine platform enables vaccine development within 48 hours of pathogen identification.

publications.title: Catalytic C-H activation using palladium complexes
publications.abstract: Novel palladium catalyst achieves 98% yield with 99% selectivity in C-H activation reactions under mild conditions.

publications.title: Synthesis and characterization of graphene quantum dots
publications.abstract: We synthesized graphene quantum dots with tunable photoluminescence properties for bioimaging applications.

publications.title: Mechanistic insights into Suzuki-Miyaura cross-coupling
publications.abstract: Computational and experimental studies reveal detailed mechanism of Suzuki-Miyaura coupling reaction.

publications.title: Green chemistry approach to pharmaceutical synthesis
publications.abstract: Sustainable synthesis route reduces waste by 85% and eliminates toxic solvents in drug manufacturing.

publications.title: Computational study of enzyme catalysis mechanisms
publications.abstract: QM/MM simulations elucidate the catalytic mechanism of serine proteases at atomic resolution.

publications.title: Quantum entanglement in superconducting qubits at room temperature
publications.abstract: We demonstrate sustained quantum entanglement in superconducting qubits operating at room temperature.

publications.title: Topological insulators in two-dimensional materials
publications.abstract: We identify topological insulator states in monolayer transition metal dichalcogenides.

publications.title: Observation of Higgs boson decay to bottom quarks
publications.abstract: ATLAS and CMS collaborations confirm Higgs boson decay to bottom quarks with 5.4 sigma significance.

publications.title: Superconductivity in hydrogen-rich compounds at high pressure
publications.abstract: We observe superconductivity at 250 K in lanthanum superhydride under 170 GPa pressure.

publications.title: Gravitational waves from binary neutron star merger
publications.abstract: LIGO and Virgo detect gravitational waves from neutron star merger with electromagnetic counterpart.

publications.title: Transformer architectures for natural language understanding
publications.abstract: We introduce GPT-5, a 10 trillion parameter model achieving human-level performance on complex reasoning tasks.

publications.title: Deep learning for protein structure prediction
publications.abstract: AlphaFold3 achieves atomic accuracy for 98% of protein domains in the PDB database.

publications.title: Reinforcement learning for autonomous vehicle navigation
publications.abstract: Deep reinforcement learning agent achieves human-level performance in complex urban driving scenarios.

publications.title: Adversarial robustness of deep neural networks
publications.abstract: We propose certified defense mechanisms improving adversarial robustness by 40% on ImageNet.

publications.title: Federated learning for privacy-preserving machine learning
publications.abstract: Federated learning framework enables collaborative model training without sharing raw data.

publications.title: Graph neural networks for molecular property prediction
publications.abstract: GNN architecture achieves state-of-the-art performance on molecular property prediction benchmarks.
